name: BREAST DURING PREGNANCY & LACTATION
definition: formation + secretion of milk (= fat + lactose + proteins) formation of colostrum around 16 weeks EGA secretion of copious milk around day 4 postpartum maintenance of milk supply around day 10 postpartum via autocrine control decreased milk production ← epithelial apoptosis
distribution: diffuse, markedly dense, heterogeneously coarse, confluent nodular breast parenchyma
discriminating_features: diffuse, markedly dense, heterogeneously coarse, confluent nodular breast parenchyma
slight diffuse hypoechogenicity of enlarged nonfatty fibroglandular component

general: diffuse, markedly dense, heterogeneously coarse, confluent nodular breast parenchyma
slight diffuse hypoechogenicity of enlarged nonfatty fibroglandular component
diffuse high SI on T2WI ← ↑ fraction of mobile water
